original: In the early days of the 11th Planet Rush, it became common parlance for hackers to refer to their cracking tools as entropy gremlins. The name caught on, and became a widespread street term for a broad spectrum of system-cracking devices by the 12th Rush. It only took another 152 years for the United Galactic Confederacy to begin regulating them on a galactic level - and only six months after that for KihaCorp to score the exclusive rights to produce them for UGC armies and Peacekeepers. Entropy Gremlin became an exclusive brand, property of KihaCorp. Entropy Gremlins: Balancing the Scales of Digital War This illegal device with an adaptive access plug can connect to almost any device and *bypass its defenses. (*Automatically complete a puzzle. Some puzzles require multiple gremlins.)
